documents.text: export const sortUsers = (users: User[]) => [...users].sort((a, b) => a.lastName.localeCompare(b.lastName));

import csv
def export_rows(path, rows):
    with open(path, 'w', newline='') as output:
        writer = csv.DictWriter(output, fieldnames=['name', 'email'])
        writer.writeheader()
        writer.writerows(rows)

name: focused-tests
on: [push]
jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with: { go-version: '1.25' }
      - run: go test ./internal/benchmark

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata: { name: search-api }
spec:
  template:
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: api
          image: example/search:latest
          readinessProbe:
            httpGet: { path: /ready, port: 8080 }

theme:
  palette:
    background: '#101418'
    foreground: '#e8edf2'
  typography:
    family: Inter
    scale: 1.125

# Embedding configuration
Set the provider, model, vector dimensions, and context window in the project configuration. Query and document templates can wrap `{{text}}` for retrieval-specific models. Keep credentials in environment variables rather than source control.

# Semantic search
The search command embeds the query, compares it with indexed code chunks, applies path and language filters, and returns the closest matches. Increase the result limit when exploring several implementations of the same behavior.

# Release checklist
Update the version, summarize user-facing changes, create the signed tag, publish artifacts, and verify package checksums before announcing the release.

#!/bin/sh
set -eu
stamp=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)
tar -czf "backup-$stamp.tar.gz" -- data/
find . -name 'backup-*.tar.gz' -mtime +7 -delete

#!/bin/sh
set -eu
for attempt in 1 2 3 4 5; do
  if curl --fail --silent http://localhost:8080/ready >/dev/null; then exit 0; fi
  sleep "$attempt"
done
exit 1

#!/bin/sh
set -eu
gofmt -w ./cmd ./internal
prettier --write 'web/**/*.{ts,tsx,css}'
